title: Database crashes when use similarity function on a table with more than 200k records
poc: CREATE TABLE t_199999 (s1 string, s2 string);
CREATE TABLE t_200000 (s1 string, s2 string);
select count(1) from t_199999 where similarity(s1, s2)> 0.5;
select count(1) from t_200000 where similarity(s1, s2)> 0.5;
key_bug_features: similarity function on tables exceeding 200k records
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t_199999 (s1 STRING, s2 STRING, s3 INT CHECK (s3 >= 0));
CREATE TABLE t_200000 (s1 STRING, s2 STRING, s3 INT CHECK (s3 >= 0));
INSERT INTO t_199999 (s1, s2, s3) SELECT 'value' || i, 'value' || i, i FROM generate_series(1, 199999) AS i;
INSERT INTO t_200000 (s1, s2, s3) SELECT 'value' || i, 'value' || i, i FROM generate_series(1, 200000) AS i;
SELECT count(1) FROM t_200000 WHERE similarity(s1, s2) > 0.5 AND s3 IS NOT NULL;
